benefit: ₹5,000 cash benefit in 3 installments for first living child. Under PMMVY 2.0 (2022): ₹6,000 for second child if it is a girl.
notes: PMMVY 2.0 introduced in 2022 expanded to second girl child. The 'first living child' criterion is crucial and often misunderstood — previous stillbirths do not reset this.

conditions.source: PMMVY Guidelines — only pregnant women/lactating mothers
PMMVY Guidelines Rule 4 — 'pregnant women of 19 years of age and above'
conditions.ambiguity_note: Age at which? At conception? At registration? At delivery? Guidelines say at time of registration.

conditions.source: PMMVY Guidelines — benefit for first living child only under 1.0
conditions.ambiguity_note: Previous miscarriage/stillbirth does NOT count as first child. The 'first living child' interpretation has caused rejections for women with pregnancy loss history.

conditions.description: Must NOT be a government employee (who gets paid maternity leave)

conditions.source: PMMVY Guidelines — central/state govt employees with maternity benefits excluded
PMMVY 2.0 — second child benefit only if girl child
conditions.ambiguity_note: PMMVY 2.0 not uniformly implemented across all states as of 2024

required_documents.document: MCP Card (Mother and Child Protection Card)
Bank Account (in woman's name, Aadhaar linked)
